_README: User-owned Ironman settings that the watch data can't provide. Edit freely. Both scripts/generate-ironman.mjs (placeholder) and scripts/import-coros.mjs (real COROS .FIT data) read this and embed it into src/data/ironman-training.json, which the chart reads. KEY KNOBS: `goalFinish` is the target time (the sub-12 line). `raceDistanceKm` are the leg distances (defaults = full Ironman). `model.paceFactors` convert TRAINING pace into RACE pace per discipline (>1 = slower in the race; run ~1.15 accounts for the off-the-bike fade). `model.transitionMinutes` is T1+T2 combined. `model.paceWindowWeeks` is how many recent weeks define your 'current' pace. These are a transparent heuristic — calibrate them once real data flows.
